attributes.action: Alow Motorcycle full access to bus lanes
attributes.additional_details: Because no national policy results in confused restrictions that can change even within a local authority.
attributes.background: To implement a joined up national policy for the universal use of bus lanes to reduce risk of conflict in traffic and reduced emissions and congestion.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'Allow motorcycles in all UK bus lanes where taxis are permitted'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746515
